name: The Rise of Captain Longbeard
short_description: Please see our special notice on closure of the service. Thank you for playing " The Rise of Captain Longbeard".
detailed_description:
Notice of service closure [Update on 24th January 2017]

To our Beloved Players,

Thank you for playing " The Rise of Captain Longbeard".
It has been real pleasure for us to hear all feedback from those who had played this early access version.
We must regretfully inform all users the suspension of further development of "The Rise of Captain Longbeard”.
The servers will be inactive on 20th February, 0:00 am (PST), 2017.
We will provide notice should there be any further updates.

We offer our sincere thanks to everyone who has supported this game.

Sincerely,

COLOPL NI

[Update on 24th January 2017]
"The Rise of Captain Longbeard" could be played on user's local environment
after the server is inactive on 20th February, 0:00 am (PST), 2017.


About the Game

Please see our special notice below on closure of the service. Thank you for playing " The Rise of Captain Longbeard".
